rulings.Case Title: JEANINE PONTES-BOELTER ET AL VS. DANIEL O'NEILL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Supplemental Answer, Or In The Alternative, Motion For Leave To File An Amended Answer To Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday June 1, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT DANIEL O'NEILL Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Supplemental Answer, Or In The Alternative, Motion For Leave To File An Amended Answer To Plaintiffs Complaint GRANTED. Amended Answered shall be filed and served forthwith. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PENSIRI COHN ET AL VS. DANIEL O'NEILL ET AL (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Daniel Oneill Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A Supplemental Answer To The Complaint, Or In The Alternative, Motion For Leave To File An Amended Answer To The Complaint.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday June 1, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT DANIEL O'NEILL Defendant Daniel Oneill Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A Supplemental Answer To The Complaint, Or In The Alternative, Motion For Leave To File An Amended Answer To The Complaint GRANTED. Amended Answered shall be filed and served forthwith. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PORCIA'S, LLC ET AL VS. LYLE A OLDER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings To Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday June 1, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT ANDREW IWACH Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings To Plaintiffs Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to the second and fourth causes of action. Motion GRANTED without leave to amend as to the first and third causes of action. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend as to the fifth cause of action (to allege standing) and as to the sixth cause of action (to re-allege as cognizable cause of action). = (501/REQ)
